reviews.comment:
Nice modern station.
9.ly oddity is that they only have Diesel amd 98 octane gasoline.

The high octane fuel is odd as it's counter productive at high altitude. Why? It's more resilient to pre ignition from pressure (compression). At over 4000m, there's less pressure inside engines as there's pess air to compress.
